title: ZXBrick Guides
description: Helpful ZXBrick guides covering how to play, power-ups, and levels.

pages.title: How to Play ZXBrick
pages.description: Learn the basics of ZXBrick, including the game goal, level progression, power-ups, achievements, and leaderboards.

pages.title: ZXBrick Power-Ups
pages.description: A practical overview of ZXBrick power-ups and how they support replayable brick-breaking arcade gameplay.

pages.title: ZXBrick Levels
pages.description: Learn about ZXBrick's 100 handcrafted levels and how level progression fits into the wider arcade experience.
